market_pulse: Mid-April momentum building across Strip nightlife with OMNIA, Zouk, and Hakkasan leading with confirmed artist announcements; Palm Tree Beach Club emerging as significant spring challenger; LIV maintaining steady pool deck activity with consistent guest profiles.

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club generating significant viral TikTok interest post-2025 launch; competitors (Tao Beach, LIV Beach) maintaining stable engagement but not matching new venue momentum
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase short-form video content highlighting pool deck exclusivity, celebrity sightings, and behind-the-scenes pool setup preparation on LIV Beach TikTok

content_gaps.description: Zouk, OMNIA, Hakkasan actively leveraging promoters and creators (@globeth0tter, @edsonvegasclubpromoter) for social reach; LIV social content relies more on internal posts than guest/creator UGC
content_gaps.suggested_action: Recruit 3-5 micro-influencers (10k-50k followers) for LIV Beach pool parties; incentivize guest list partnerships with creator codes; feature guest reviews in LIV Stories

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Hakkasan featuring Steve Aoki, OMNIA featuring Zedd/DeOrro, Tao Beach featuring Tiësto) post countdown teasers, behind-the-scenes DJ prep, and post-event highlights; LIV posts focus on event promotion but lack narrative depth
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 2-3 post series per week: pre-event DJ interview reels, live mixing clips during sets, post-party highlight compilations for LIV Nightclub content
